_comment: SYNTHETIC fixture. Some transcription backends (e.g. a minimal custom server) return segment-level timestamps only and silently ignore timestamp_granularities[] (see fws_segment_response.json for a real segment-only capture). This file models the standard OpenAI / faster-whisper-server verbose_json word shape (words nested under each segment, tokens carry a leading space and punctuation) so the word-level path stays tested until a word-capable server is configured.
